pan-fried-shrimp-with-lime-butter.name: Pan-fried Shrimp With Lime Butter
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Mix egg and water together to make a light egg wash.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Place breadcrumbs in a shallow dish.'}
{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Dip shrimp into the egg wash and toss into breadcrumbs.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a pan over medium heat. Add shrimp and fry until firm and opaque, 4 to 6 minutes.'}
{'step': '5', 'instruction': 'Remove shrimp and keep warm.'}
{'step': '6', 'instruction': 'Rinse out the pan. Heat butter and remaining 2 tablespoons oil in the pan.'}
{'step': '7', 'instruction': 'Add lime juice; bring to a boil. Continue boiling for 1 minute.'}
{'step': '8', 'instruction': 'Return cooked shrimp to the pan and stir to coat with the lime sauce.'}
{'step': '9', 'instruction': 'Serve immediately.'}

panna-cotta-with-strawberry-jam.name: Panna Cotta With Strawberry Jam
instructions: Sprinkle gelatin over water; let stand until dissolved, about 1 minute.

Place heavy cream, milk, sugar, lemon zest, and vanilla bean in a saucepan over medium heat; cook, stirring constantly, until mixture is simmering. Simmer gently, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and discard vanilla bean.
Stir gelatin mixture into the hot cream mixture until dissolved. Stir in strawberry jam. Pour into small dessert cups, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until set, 8 hours to overnight.

papaya-bavaroise-teleculinaria.name: Papaya Bavaroise
instructions: Peel the papaya, remove the lump and cut into pieces. Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water. Then pour them out and put them in a pot with the milk, take them to the fire and let them boil. Take it out of the fire and let it cool.
Add the condensed milk and half the papaya and crush very well. Apart beat the creams in whipped cream very firmly and wrap with the previous preparation.

Fill a form with oil and pour it. Take it to the cold until solidify. Then remove and deform. Crush the remaining papaya and pour over the bavaroise, as you see in the photo. Decorate to taste and serve.

papaya-with-orange-and-lime.name: Papaya With Orange And Lime
instructions: Arrange papaya wedges and orange segments on plates; serve with lime wedges.

partridge-with-mushrooms-teleculinaria.name: Partridge With Mushrooms
instructions: Wash the partridges and cut them into pieces. Season them like chopped garlic, blond, salt and pepper.
Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, o presunto cortado em tiras e as perdizes. Junte a cebola picada e deixe alourar um pouco. Regue com o vinho e deixe ferver.

Wash the mushrooms, cut them into pieces and add them to the sauté. Season with thyme, salt and pepper. Cover the pot and let me see, in a light. Remove from the fire and eliminate the blond and thyme.
Cut the bread into medium-sized slices, dispose of them on a deep plate and pour the partridge over. Tape with adhesive film and wait about 5 minutes. Serve immediately.

pasta-with-roasted-romanesco-and-capers.name: Pasta With Roasted Romanesco And Capers

ingredients.item: Plus 3 tablespoons olive oil; plus more for drizzling
Lumaconi (snail shells) or other medium shell pasta

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Cook almonds, ¼ cup oil, and 1 Tbsp. capers in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, swirling pan occasionally, until capers burst and almonds are golden brown and smell toasty, about 5 minutes. Transfer almonds and capers with a slotted spoon to a small bowl; season with salt. Let cool. Toss romanesco with oil from saucepan on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Roast, tossing halfway through, until golden brown and tender, 20–25 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add garlic, ½ tsp. red pepper flakes, and remaining 1 Tbsp. capers and cook, stirring often, until garlic is golden, about 3 minutes. Add wine and cook until liquid is almost completely evaporated, about 2 minutes.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 3 minutes less than package directions.

Using a spider or a slotted spoon, transfer pasta to pot with garlic; add 1 cup pasta cooking liquid. Reduce heat to medium and cook, tossing often, until pasta is al dente and liquid is slightly thickened, about 3 minutes. Add ¼ cup pasta cooking liquid, then gradually add cheese, tossing until melted and dissolved into a luxurious, glossy sauce. Remove from heat; add butter and toss to combine. Toss in romanesco.
Divide pasta among bowls. Top with fried almonds and capers and more red pepper flakes and drizzle with oil.

pastry-cream-the-recipe-to-make-it-peque.name: Pastry Cream, The Recipe To Make It
pastry-cream-the-recipe-to-make-it-peque.original_name: Crema pastelera fácil, la receta para que te salga perfecta

ingredients.item: 1 vaina de vainilla o esencia de vainilla (al gusto)

instructions: Let's put the 500 million milk into a saucer and put it at medium heat. If you're using a vanilla pod, this is the time to open it, scrape the seeds and add them to milk. You can also use vanilla essence but add it at the end so that it doesn't lose smell. We put the milk to boiling and remove it from the fire
In a separate bowl, we beat up 4 egg yolks with 100 g of sugar. Take your time at this step, we want the yolks well mixed and whitish. That will help get the cream soft.

We add the 40 g of corn flour (maicena) to the bowl with yolks and sugar. We mix well till there's no groove. That step was key, as a homogenous blend would prevent the pastry cream from being pitted later.

A little by little, we will add hot milk (which has already been infused with vanilla) to the mixture of yolks, sugar and maicene. It's important to do so in small amounts at first and while at the same time withdrawing, to avoid the yolks from falling with heat.

Let's put the mixture back into the saucer and put it to medium heat, constantly stirring with a scatula or stick beaker. We have to be attentive here as the cream will start to weigh. It's crucial that you don't stop to remove, so that they don't stick and form clumps. When the cream has been weighed and has the desired consistency (similar to some steels), we withdraw from the fire. If you see that she's got some crumbling, you can get them to get a more thin texture. That step's optional, but it'll help make the cream even smoother.

Let's put the cream into a clear bowl and cover the surface with clear film and make sure that the plastic's in direct contact with the cream. That will prevent a scab from growing as it gets cold. We let them cool at room temperature and then we put them in the refrigerator if we aren't using them right away.

pastry-with-curd-cheese-lezzet.name: Pastry With Curd Cheese
instructions: 1. Un, milk, yeast, salt, sugar blend in a large bowl.
2. Do the flour or milk addition if necessary for a dough in medium softness.
3. Relax over 40 minutes with damp cloth.
4. blend Lor cheese and fine chopped parsley in a bowl.
5. Cut the eggs size parts from the dough with copart and roller.
6. Place it from cheese mortar on one side and close it in the form of half a month.
7. Preheat back in the angry fat.
8. Serve hot.

peach-aperol-spritz.name: Peach-aperol Spritz

ingredients.prep: cut into wedges, or frozen, thawed sliced peaches

instructions: Muddle peaches in a large pitcher to crush lightly. Add Aperol, Averna, lemon slices, and orange slices. Pour in rosé and stir gently to combine. Pour into glasses to serve.

peach-raspberry-crisp.name: Peach-raspberry Crisp
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 8x10-inch glass baking dish with 1 teaspoon butter.

Fill a large bowl with ice and cold water. Bring a large pot of water to a rapid boil. Gently plunge peaches into the boiling water for 30 to 45 seconds; transfer to the bowl of ice water using a slotted spoon. Peel peaches, cut each into 8 wedges, and place in a large bowl.
Stir ¼ cup white sugar, ¼ cup brown sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, orange zest, and cinnamon into peaches; mix well to coat. Fold in raspberries. Set aside for 5 to 7 minutes.

Meanwhile, beat 1 cup flour, oats, 1 cup butter, remaining ½ cup white sugar, remaining ½ cup brown sugar, and salt in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment until well combined into pea-sized crumbs.
Pour peach-raspberry mixture into the prepared baking dish; top evenly with crumble topping. Place the baking dish on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is golden brown and fruit juices are bubbling, about 1 hour.
Cool crisp before serving, 45 to 60 minutes.

peanut-butter-espresso-martini.name: Peanut Butter Espresso Martini
instructions: Warm the peanut butter until it is loose enough to drizzle, then drizzle around the inside of a martini or coupe glass.
In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, combine the Skrewball® Peanut Butter Whiskey, coffee liqueur, and espresso and shake vigorously for 1 minute.
Strain the cocktail into the martini glass. Place the espresso beans in the center and finish with a pinch of smoked sea salt.
Enjoy!

peanut-butter-fondue.name: Peanut Butter Fondue
instructions: Stir brown sugar, corn syrup, and butter together in a small saucepan over low heat until butter is melted and mixture is combined, about 5 minutes.
Add peanut butter, evaporated milk, and marshmallows; cook, stirring constantly, until marshmallows are melted and mixture is smooth, 3 to 5 minutes more.
Stir vanilla into peanut butter mixture, remove from heat, and transfer mixture to a fondue pot.

pear-baby-food.name: Pear Baby Food
instructions: Place pears in a large saucepan and just barely cover with water.
Simmer over medium-low heat until tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
Remove cooked pears with a slotted spoon and place in a food processor or blender; puree until smooth.
Allow to cool before serving.

peppermint-meringues.name: Peppermint Meringues
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Using an electric mixer, beat egg whites and salt on medium-high speed until white and foamy, about 1 minute. With mixer running, gradually add suger in 3 additions beating for 2 minutes between each addition. Beat until firm peaks form, about 2 minutes longer. Add powdered sugar and peppermint extract; beat to blend, about 1 minute.

Dot coloring over surface of meringue; do not stir (the coloring will form swirls when piped). Spoon meringue into a pastry bag fitted with a 1/2" tip. (See Prep School; alternatively, spoon into a plastic freezer bag, then cut 1/2" off 1 corner.) Twist top; pipe 1" rounds onto prepared sheet, spacing 1" apart.

Bake meringues until dry, about 2 1/2 hours. Let cool completely, about 1 hour (meringues will crisp as they cool). DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature between sheets of parchment or waxed paper.

pepperoni-with-puff-pastry-argiro.name: Pepperoni With Puff Pastry

ingredients.item: 2 peppers (red and yellow, cut into thin slices)
2 peppers (red and yellow, cut into thin slices)

instructions: Heat the olive oil first in a pan over medium heat.
After chopping the vegetables, add them to the olive oil and sauté them for 5 minutes until slightly wilted.
Immediately after removing the pan from the heat and allow the vegetables to cool down.
Add the feta cheese (strikes), in a bowl, add the sauteed vegetables, egg, pepper and basil.
Mix the materials together.
Open the crust sheet on the counter with a sharp knife, cut into strips along 10 cm, add 1 tablespoon filling on the edge and wrap diagonally into a triangle.
We're wetting the edges to make the leaf stick.
After finishing with the whole Leaf and Filling, Fry the pepper pies in hot olive oil 2 minutes on each side or baking after oiling with a brush at 200°C for 25 minutes to brown.

pesto-garden-pasta-for-the-whole-family.name: Pesto Garden Pasta For The Whole Family

ingredients.prep: short, such as farfalle or penne

instructions: Add the basil, olive oil, Parmesan, almond butter, lemon juice, garlic, lemon zest, salt, and pepper to a blender. Blend until smooth and set aside.
Cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
Drain and transfer the pasta to a large serving bowl.
Add the grape tomatoes, yellow tomatoes, red onion, and mozzarella balls to the pasta.
Pour the pesto sauce over the pasta.
Toss the ingredients together.
Serve warm in a bowl.

Enjoy!

Adapted from The Minimalist Kitchen by Melissa Coleman. Copyright © 2018 Oxmoor House. Reprinted with permission from Time Inc. Books, a division of Meredith Corporation. New York, NY. All rights reserved.

phoenicians-key-lime-pie.name: Phoenician's Key Lime Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

To make the crust: Pulse almonds in a food processor until finely ground, then pour into a medium bowl. Add graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and salt. Pour in melted butter and mix until evenly moistened. Press into a 9-inch pie plate.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is golden brown, 10 to 13 minutes.

While crust is baking, make the filling: Beat condensed milk, cream, egg yolks, and lime zest in a large bowl until well combined. Whisk in lime juice, a little at a time, to thicken custard. Pour custard into pie crust.
Bake until custard is set, about 15 minutes. Cool to room temperature on a wire rack, then cover loosely with plastic wrap and chill in the refrigerator for 8 hours to overnight.

picanha-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Picanha In The Oven
instructions: Disponha a picanha num tabuleiro e tempere-a com sal, pimenta e o louro. Acrescente o tomate, a cebola cortada em rodelas e a manteiga e regue com o vinho.
Wash, cut the potatoes in half and mix them in a tragedy with the chestnuts. Season everything with olive oil, rosemary, salt and pepper. Take both traditions to the oven, preheated to 180.
Passados 15 minutos, retire o tabuleiro das batatas e das castanhas, reserve e deixe a carne assar, por mais 45 minutos. Corte a carne em fatias e sirva-as com as batatas e as castanhas.

pickle-dip.name: Pickle Dip
instructions: Mix sour cream, cream cheese, pickles, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and dill together in a bowl until well combined.
Stir in dill pickle juice to taste.
Serve with potato chips and enjoy!

pickled-daikon-and-watermelon-radishes.name: Pickled Daikon And Watermelon Radishes
instructions: Bring cider vinegar, rice vinegar, sugar, salt, lime juice, chiles, coriander seeds, and ¼ cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Let cool 10 minutes.
Place daikon and radish in a large bowl and add pickling liquid. Cover and chill at least 4 hours and up to 5 days. Serve with Korean Fried Chicken Wings (click for recipe).

pie-with-pumpkin-and-apple-argiro.name: Pie With Pumpkin And Apple

ingredients.item: A little sugar and cinnamon for serving
A little sugar and cinnamon for serving

instructions: In a deep pan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over low heat.
Add the pumpkin, carrots and apple and let them wither and absorb their liquids.
Turn up the heat to dry the mixture and put it out with the brandy.
Remove from heat and add the semolina, half the sugar, walnuts and raisins.
Mix and allow the filling to cool.
Open the leaf.
We butter a baking pan (30–32 cm) or a fireproof long-sealed vessel.
Mix and allow the filling to cool.
Open the leaf.
We butter a baking pan (30–32 cm) or a fireproof long-sealed vessel.
Lay 6 leaves, buttering them one by one and sprinkle each leaf with some of the remaining sugar and cinnamon.
Empty the filling on the leaves and spread it evenly.
We're turning the edges of the leaves inside.
Cover with the remaining leaves, buttering and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar, as before.
The remaining leaves are folded down or cut.
Brush the surface with melted butter.
Leave the baking pan in the refrigerator for 10 minutes to freeze the butter and make it more easily.
Sprinkle the pie into pieces.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, at 170°C, on the medium rack, for about 50 minutes until the leaf is well browned.
Once cold, sprinkle with powder and cinnamon sugar.

pineapple-chile-limeade.name: Pineapple-chile Limeade
instructions: Muddle pineapple, chiles, lime juice, and simple syrup in a large pitcher until pineapple is in small pieces.
Add 2 cups ice and stir vigorously until very cold, about 30 seconds.
Pour limeade through a fine-mesh sieve into ice-filled glasses.
Top off each drink with club soda and garnish with lime wheels.

pirohu-lezzet.name: Pirohu
instructions: 1. Mix flour, salt, egg and liquid oil.
2. Slowly knead dough by adding water.
3. Aftertiring the dough from the bugs of the dough for 5-10 minutes, stretch listed by film covering.
4. Take salty lor cheese in a bowl and crush it with the help of fork.
5. Mix it by adding mint to your car.
6. Take the dough 2 clotheye and finely a&ccedil with the help of the roller.
7. The dough cup with the mouth of the dough, split.
8. Fori, mortar fill with and close half a month.
9. After applying the same process to the dough, shape the edges with fork.
10.   boil water in the water.
11. 11. Cook for 10 minutes by adding dough to boiling water.
12. Check out pirohus serving plate.
12. August Serve by adding hellim cheese and dereotu on it.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

pistachio-baklava-with-orange-cardamom-s.name: Pistachio Baklava With Orange-cardamom Syrup

ingredients.item: X9-inch sheets fresh phyllo pastry or frozen

instructions: Simmer 1 3/4 cups sugar and orange juice in saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Boil over medium heat until reduced to 1 1/2 cups, about 8 minutes. Add cardamom. Cool syrup.

Place nuts and 2 tablespoons sugar in processor. Using on/off turns, process until most of nuts are finely ground (the largest pieces should be the size of small peas). Mix nuts, 6 tablespoons sugar, and cinnamon in medium bowl.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Brush 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish with some of melted butter. Place 1 phyllo sheet on bottom of dish. Brush lightly with melted butter. Repeat 9 more times with phyllo and melted butter. Sprinkle half of pistachio mixture (about 1 1/2 cups) evenly over phyllo. Place 1 phyllo sheet over nuts; brush lightly with butter. Repeat 9 more times with phyllo sheets and melted butter. Sprinkle remaining pistachio mixture evenly over. Place 1 phyllo sheet atop nuts; brush with butter. Repeat 9 more times with phyllo sheets and melted butter.

Using sharp knife, cut diagonally through top phyllo layer from top left corner to bottom right corner. Cut top layer of phyllo into 1-inch-wide rows parallel to both sides of first cut. Turn pan and cut rows about 2 1/4 inches wide, forming diamond pattern.

Bake baklava until golden brown and crisp, 50 to 55 minutes. Drizzle syrup evenly over hot baklava. Cool in pan on rack. Recut baklava along lines all the way through layers. DO AHEAD Baklava can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Sift powdered sugar over, if desired.

pistachio-fluff-salad.name: Pistachio Fluff Salad
instructions: Dump instant pudding into a large mixing bowl. Add pineapple with juice; mix well.
Stir in whipped topping until combined.
Add bananas, marshmallows, fruit cocktail, and mandarin oranges; mix until incorporated.
Cover and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled, about 2 to 4 hours.
Serve and enjoy!

pizza-sauce.name: Pizza Sauce
instructions: Whisk garlic, tomatoes, oil, and salt in a medium bowl. Don’t be tempted to add more salt; the flavor will concentrate when sauce is baked with pizza. Cover and chill 3 hours to let flavors come together before using.
Sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled.

poached-salmon-with-avocado-sauce.name: Poached Salmon With Avocado Sauce

ingredients.item: Stringed trimmed sugar snap peas or snow peas

instructions: Season fish with salt and pepper. Place in an 8x8x2" or 9x9x2" metal or glass baking dish. Scatter half of tarragon over fish. Let sit at room temperature for 10 minutes
Bring broth to a boil in a small pot. Pour over salmon to submerge. Let stand until cooked to medium-rare, 10–15 minutes. Using a spatula, transfer to a plate; chill.

Cook sugar snap peas in a pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer peas to a bowl of ice water. Let cool; drain. Cut larger snap peas in half on a diagonal.
Scoop avocado flesh into a food processor. Add yogurt, 1 Tbsp. lime juice, and cumin; purée. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and additional lime juice, if desired.

Spoon about 1/2 cup avocado purée into the middle of each plate. Mix remaining tarragon, peas, arugula, tomatoes, and shallot in a medium bowl. Drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil; season with lime juice (if desired), salt, and pepper. Toss; divide among plates. Top with salmon and chives; drizzle each fillet with 1/4 tsp. oil. Serve with lime wedges

pochas-a-la-navarra-pequerecetas.name: Pochas A La Navarra

ingredients.item: (optional) sweet or hot pimenton as preferred

instructions: If you have fresh tights, you have to scrape them from their pods before cooking them. Unlike dry beans that have been bought and have been broken, fresh pits are generally sold inside their pods. Here I explain how to do this: select the steaks: choose full and firm pods, indicating that the grains inside are well developed. Open Fairy: Use your fingers to open the Fairy throughout. If the pods are at their optimum mature point, they should be opened easily. Extract the Grains: Take the grains from the pods with your fingers. The props have to be firm but tender. Filling fresh pits is a quite simple process, and additional efforts are worth the taste and texture they bring to your plates. Once they have been pitted, the pits are ready to be washed and cooked as they have no need for mooring. If you're using dry pits, you'll have to scrape them in water the previous night. That helps them to hydrate and cook faster and more evenly.

Gather some extra virgin olive oil into the pan. Warm him up at medium heat. You don't need a lot of oil, just enough to cover the bottom of the pan slightly. Once the oil's hot (but nonsmoking), add the chopped onion. The idea is to cook the onion till it's translucent and soft, we're not looking for it to get golden. After a few minutes, as soon as the onion starts to soft up, add garlic and minced green pepper. Keep the mixture to medium heat, stirring occasionally. What you're after is that garlic and pepper are also soft and all flavors are well mixed. That procedure usually takes about 5 to 10 minutes. Be careful to avoid burning the garlic as this can give a bitter taste to the saffrit. Add carrot slices and minced tomatoes to the frying. Cooking this mixture for a few more minutes, allowing flavors to blend and tomatoes to release their juice.

Add the pits to the casserole. Gently move the casserole to mix with the sodand. Cover the pits with water or vegetable stock, making sure they are completely submerged. Add the bay leaf, salt and pepper to your taste. If you wish, add some peppermint. To do this, heat up some oil in a frying pan and add a pinch of pimenton and remove it from the fire before inserting them into the stew.

After preparing the socorro and adding the pits, let the stew get to boiling. Once you have boiled, reduce fire to maintain a soft boiling. The cooking continues with low heat, monitoring and motif occasionally. Begins to check the texture of the pits after about 25 to 30 minutes. You're looking for them to be tender but still firm. Avoid overcooking them as they can become too soft and get rid of them. Once tights are cooked at your best, tighten the condiments if necessary and let the stew rest a few minutes before serving. Remember that these times are close and may vary, so it's important to check cooking as you advance. Take the pits to Navarra with some gills or pits.

polish-pickle-soup.name: Polish Pickle Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a stock pot over medium-low heat. Add potatoes and carrots; cook until beginning to soften, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.

Stir in pickles, flour, pickle juice, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, onion salt, sugar, dill, curry powder, and white pepper. Add broth, milk, and bay leaves; simmer until vegetables are soft and soup reduces slightly, about 1 hour. Season with salt.

porcini-gnocchi-with-butter-sauce.name: Porcini Gnocchi With Butter Sauce
instructions: Place rack in middle of oven; preheat to 177°C (175°C). Poke holes all over potatoes with a fork and place on a wire rack set inside a large rimmed baking sheet. Roast potatoes until flesh is easily pierced with a fork, 45–60 minutes. Let sit until just cool enough to handle, about 15 minutes.
Peel potatoes and pass through a potato ricer (or use the bottom of a glass to push through a fine-mesh sieve). Place in a large bowl and let cool completely.
Meanwhile, pulse dried mushrooms in a spice mill or a high-speed blender to a fine powder. Transfer to a medium bowl and add flour and ¼ tsp. salt; whisk to combine.
Add dry ingredients and egg to bowl with potatoes and fold together. Then, using your hands, form into a single mass. Turn out onto a work surface and knead until smooth.

Cut dough into 6 portions. Working with 1 portion at a time and covering remaining portions with plastic wrap while you work, roll each portion into a rope about ½" wide. Cut into ½"-long pieces and roll each piece along fork to form ridges. Arrange gnocchi in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet (line with parchment paper if making ahead).
Cook gnocchi in a large pot of boiling salted water until they float to the surface, about 3 minutes (4 minutes if cooking from frozen). Drain, reserving ½ cup cooking liquid.

While the gnocchi is cooking, heat butter in a medium high-sided skillet over medium, stirring often, until it foams, then browns, 5–8 minutes. Add sage leaves and ¼ cup reserved pasta cooking liquid, tilting the pan away from you to protect yourself from spattering. Once spattering has settled down, swirl liquid in pan, then add gnocchi and cook, tossing and adding remaining pasta cooking liquid a little at a time (you might not need all of it) until sauce is combined and creamy and pasta is well coated, about 1 minute.
Divide pasta among shallow bowls and top with Parmesan.
Do ahead: Gnocchi can be formed 3 days ahead. Tightly wrap baking sheet and freeze.

pork-carnitas.name: Pork Carnitas
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven over high heat. Season pork shoulder pieces with salt, then arrange in the Dutch oven. Cook until browned on all sides, about 10 minutes.
Stir in onion, garlic, lime juice, chili powder, oregano, and cumin. Pour in chicken broth; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until pork is very tender, about 2 1/2 hours.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Transfer pork shoulder to a large baking sheet; reserve cooking liquid. Drizzle a small amount of cooking liquid over pork pieces and lightly season with salt.
Bake pork in the preheated oven until browned, about 30 minutes. Drizzle more cooking liquid every 10 minutes; use two forks to shred pork as it browns.
Serve hot and enjoy!

pork-loin-stuffed-with-dried-fruits-tele.name: Pork Loin Stuffed With Dried Fruits
pork-loin-stuffed-with-dried-fruits-tele.original_name: Lombo de porco recheado com frutos secos
instructions: Fix the pork loin and cut it in the middle and in the length direction without separating it. Lay the palm almond in a bowl, add the sultans and plums and mix well. Spread over the loin, sprinkle with some pepper, close and even with a kitchen wire.

Coloque depois num tabuleiro e tempere com os dentes de alho picados finamente, a folha de louro, a paprica, a cerveja, o caldo de carne desfeito, sal e pimenta. Envolva bem e deixe marinar durante 30 minutos.
Then water with the olive oil and bring it to the oven preheated at 180°C for 45 minutes or until it is well roasted and golden. Serve sliced and followed to taste.

porridge-with-mushrooms-and-wine-argiro.name: Porridge With Mushrooms And Wine
instructions: Clean and slice the mushrooms first.
Heat the olive oil in a pot or deep pan and add the mushrooms over high heat for 5 minutes to drink their liquids.
Add the onion and mix.
Allow for 2-3 minutes to become clear.
Add the oatmeal, paste and put out with the wine.
Allow the alcohol to evaporate for a few minutes and add the warm broth.
Finally add salt and pepper.
Cover the vessel and simmer for 10 minutes until it looks like a pilafi.
Finally sprinkle the parsley and serve immediately with fasting cheese.

portuguese-alguidar-meat-teleculinaria.name: Portuguese Alguidar Meat

ingredients.item: 800 g  carne de porco em cubos
Batatas fritas em rodelas para acompanhar

instructions: Place the meat in a bowl and season with chopped garlic teeth, white wine, blond leaf, pepper paste, salt and pepper. Involve and let marinate for some time.

Then heat a frying pan with olive oil and lard. Add the jerky and let it blush well. Then water with the marinade and let it cook until the meat is soft. Retrieve the seasonings and remove from the fire.
Transfira a carne para uma travessa, junte azeitonas pretas e salpique com salsa picada. Sirva com batatas fritas em rodelas.

potato-salad-with-carrot-and-egg.name: Potato Salad With Carrot And Egg

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Soak potatoes in a bowl of water to draw out the bitterness, about 15 minutes.
Rub salt over cucumber and onion slices; squeeze out excess moisture and pat dry. Set aside.

Drain potatoes and place into a pot with carrot. Add enough water to cover. Season with salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer until potatoes can be easily pierced with a bamboo skewer, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove carrot from the pot when tender.
Drain potatoes and return to the pot. Add apple juice and vinegar; mash potatoes with a wooden spatula or fork for about 2 minutes.

Transfer mashed potatoes to a bowl. Add carrot, cucumber, onion, and eggs. Mix in mayonnaise, then season with salt and pepper. Refrigerate until cool, 30 minutes to 1 hour. Serve in individual bowls.

potatoes-in-the-air-fryer-argiro.name: Potatoes In The Air Fryer
instructions: Boil in a pot of water and add salt.
Clean the potatoes, cut them into quince (in four) and each piece in half.
Boil them for 10 minutes and then drain them very well to remove all the water.
Add the potatoes to a dry pot.
Shake the pot very well to break externally and obtain wild surface.
Sprinkle them with olive oil, sprinkle with a little salt and shake the vessel to oil.
Preheat the air fryer for 3 minutes at 200
Add the potatoes to its basket and add the garlic for perfume.
Lower the temperature to 180

preparation-of-a-grilled-chicken-sandwic.name: Preparation Of A Grilled Chicken Sandwich
preparation-of-a-grilled-chicken-sandwic.original_name: Preparación de un sándwich de pollo a la plancha

ingredients.item: 1  pechuga de pollo deshuesada de 200 gramos
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: It pits chicken breast into 2 steaks with a thickness of 1 cm or more.
Put the chicken into a plastic bowl and mix all the ingredients of the marinade.
Deja este marinado en la nevera tapado por 1 hora.
Once this time has passed, get the chicken out and cook it in a frying pan with a very small jet of vegetable oil.
Deja que se cocine bien por ambas caras. Una vez listo lo retiras del fuego y dejas aparte.
Now I just put the sandwich into a classic form.
On one of the inner faces of the bread put the mayonnaise, then the ruula, the cherry tomatoes minced into mitades and the chicken you previously cooked.
Close the sandwich with the other piece of bread.
That's it. Enjoy your homemade chicken sandwich.
That's easy, isn't it?

preparation-of-a-juicy-and-well-made-fre.name: Preparation Of A Juicy And Well-made French Omelet
preparation-of-a-juicy-and-well-made-fre.original_name: Preparación de una tortilla francesa jugosa y bien hecha
instructions: We will start by pounding the eggs into a bowl, pounding them to taste and beating them very well with a manual beaker or simply with a fork. While we beat them up, we'll add a chorrit of milk to our production and mix them well.

Now we'll warm an oil jet into an anti-stick frying pan (with medium heat). While the oil's hot, we'll have to get the frying pan through the handle and make sure it's distributed evenly across the whole base of the Utensil. That way we'll avoid the risk that the omelette will stick. It's also important to use enough oil to make the omelette well hydrated (without abuse, because we don't want to make an egg and oil mix). We can start from a tablespoon of oil as a quantity of base, which may vary with the size of the frying pan.

With hot and well distributed oil we will lower the intensity of fire to medium-low and we will pour the egg mix. We'll let them cook at the bottom, which will be really quick. It will be sufficient to move the frying pan slightly, by using the handle, to feel a change of consistency.

Then we will move the frying pan so that it slips slightly and we will help with a kitchen scatula to bend it (another option is to light the edges from one side with the scatula, and then bend the other side to give it the characteristic form of the French omelette).

When we see that omelette takes a golden color out, it'll be ready to eat. It will normally take a few minutes, or up to 4 to 5 minutes if you want to get a well-cooked omelette (though the richest are the juicy ones inside and require less cooking time).
Eso es todo. Sirve inmediatamente.

preparation-of-oven-roasted-sardines-com.name: Preparation Of Oven-roasted Sardines
preparation-of-oven-roasted-sardines-com.original_name: Preparación de sardinas asadas al horno
instructions: Limpia bien las sardinas, que no tengan escamas ni exceso de espinas.
It pits onion and garlic and parsley into small pieces. If you prefer, you can use an electrical pitcher.
Mix sardines with onion, garlic and parsley. Add them salt and pepper and a generous jet of olive oil.
It leaves with an hour in a covered container, while pressurizes the oven at 150 been 3.

On a plate put all sardines with skin down. Woven them for 15 minutes or till they are cooked. Remember, and it's very important this, that sometimes the furnaces have higher or lower temperatures than they indicate, so you have to care that they are not burned or have been shortened after the time I have indicated in the recipe.
Take out the sardines and turn them with their skin and look up and bake them again for another 5 minutes.
Withdraw from the oven and serve them. You can put another jet of olive oil at lunch.

prepare-four-cheese-pappaderlle-comedera.name: Prepare Four Cheese Pappaderlle
instructions: Cut cheeses into small cubes or you can scrape them.
Peel his garlic teeth and scrape them.
Cocina la pasta en agua con sal, siguiendo las instrucciones del empaque o hasta que quede al dente.
Warm up a frying pan and melt the butter. Fold your garlic teeth till they get some light.
Incorpora la crema de leche y mezcla. Cocina a fuego medio hasta que rompa hervor.
At that time, add cheeses to cubes. Mixing and cooking with medium heat till they are merged.
Sazona con un poco de sal y pimienta y termina de mezclar.
It incorporates the dough with two tablespoons of water where it was cooked and pits carefully until impregnated with the sauce.
Once ready, serve and decorate with more parmesan or parsley cheese.

prepare-some-delicious-chicken-thighs-wi.name: Prepare Some Delicious Chicken Thighs With Maple Glaze
prepare-some-delicious-chicken-thighs-wi.original_name: Prepara unos ricos muslos de pollo con glaseado de maple

ingredients.item: 8  muslos de pollo con piel y hueso
1/2 taza de jarabe de maple puro
1 / 2 cdite of freshly ground black pepper

instructions: In a small saucer with medium heat, melt the butter. Add the chopped garlic and sprinkle till fragrant.
Incorpora el jarabe de maple, la mostaza Dijon, la salsa de soja, el tomillo, el vinagre de manzana, y la pimienta. Cocina por 5 minutos o hasta que espese ligeramente. Retira del fuego y reserva.
It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been (204 been 3).
Seca los muslos de pollo con toallas de papel y sazona con sal y pimienta.
In a large frying pan, heat some oil with medium-high heat and seal the thighs from both sides till they are golden.
Coloca los muslos en una bandeja para hornear. Pinta generosamente con el glaseado de maple preparado.
Hornea for 25-30 minutes, with more frying at half of the cooking, till the chicken is well cooked (internal temperature should reach 74-3 or 74-3).
Retira del horno y deja reposar 5 minutos antes de servir. Puedes decorar con hojas frescas de tomillo si lo deseas.

prepare-these-strawberry-carlotas-comede.name: Prepare These Strawberry Carlotas
instructions: Let's start our recipe, cutting strawberries into medium sheets that will be the leading characters of dessert.

En una licuadora, vas a agregar la barra de queso crema, la leche condensada, la leche evaporada, unas gotitas de colorante rojo, el extracto de esencia de vainilla y 13 onzas de las fresas laminadas.
It should be liquefied until all ingredients are well incorporated.
Now, you're going to add some lemon juice. Fold with liquefied to integrate until you get a mixture with creamy and thick texture.

puff-tart-with-cream-and-condensed-milk-.name: Puff Tart With Cream And Condensed Milk
puff-tart-with-cream-and-condensed-milk-.original_name: Tarte folhada de natas e leite condensado
instructions: Misture bem o leite condensado com os ovos e as gemas e depois adicione as natas, em fio e mexendo sempre.
Unroll the leafy dough, line a 22 cm diameter shape with it, keeping the vegetable paper that accompanies it underneath, and pinch the bottom with a fork.
Lay the cream on the tart and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 40 minutes. Remove, cool and refrigerate for at least 1 hour. Serve sprinkled with cinnamon and powdered sugar.

pull-apart-cheesy-garlic-loaf.name: Pull-apart Cheesy Garlic Loaf
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Cut top ½" off garlic bulb so that tops of cloves are exposed. Place on a square of foil and drizzle with oil, making sure as much as possible gets inside. Bring up foil around garlic to make a tight packet and bake until cloves are soft, 20–25 minutes. Transfer garlic bulb (still in packet!) to a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet, placing to one side (you want to leave room for the bread).
Slice bread across the top in a 1" crosshatch pattern, cutting most of the way through but leaving the bottom crust intact.

Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium; remove from heat. Add grated garlic and swirl pan to gently warm the garlic. Add parsley, thyme, rosemary, salt, and pepper and swirl pan to combine everything.
Brush top and cut sides of bread with butter, working down into crevices. Sprinkle cheese over  loaf, making sure some gets in between the cuts as well as on top.
Set the loaf on baking sheet with garlic. Bake loaf until cheese is melted, 18–20 minutes. Unwrap garlic and serve with cheesy loaf.
Do Ahead: Bread can be assembled 3 days ahead. Wrap tightly and chill.

pull-apart-garlic-rolls.name: Pull-apart Garlic Rolls
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190°C).
Cut biscuits into fourths, and place in a large mixing bowl.
Add the butter, garlic powder, parsley, and mozzarella, and mix with your hands, coating all of the biscuit pieces.
Place the pieces in a muffin tin, 3 pieces per tin (you’ll have 2 extra—just use them in whichever tin you want). Bake for 15 minutes. Best served fresh out of the oven!
Enjoy!

pumpkin-seed-crusted-tofu-with-lemongras.name: Pumpkin-seed-crusted Tofu With Lemongrass Broth, Rice Noodles, And Poached Eggs

ingredients.item: - to 14-ounce packages firm or extra-firm tofu (preferably organic)

instructions: Mix radishes, white wine vinegar, and 1/4 teaspoon coarse salt in small bowl. Cover; chill overnight.
Stack several layers of paper towels on work surface. Arrange tofu on towels; drain 30 minutes, patting tops dry occasionally.

Whisk cornstarch and egg whites in shallow dish until cornstarch dissolves. Grind panko and pumpkin seeds in mini processor; pour crumb mixture into another shallow dish. Mix salt, sugar, paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder in small bowl.

Working with 1 piece at a time, sprinkle tofu on both sides with salt mixture. Dip tofu into egg-white mixture, then crumb mixture to coat on all sides. Place on rimmed baking sheet. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Refrigerate.

Cook rice noodles in large saucepan of boiling salted water until just tender, about 7 minutes. Drain. Rinse with cold water to cool quickly and drain again. Transfer to large bowl; mix in hoisin and oil to coat. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Fill large bowl halfway with cool water. Pour enough water into large skillet to reach depth of 1 1/2 inches; bring to simmer. Reduce heat to medium-low. Salt water generously. Working with 1 egg at a time, crack 4 eggs and drop each into water. Simmer very gently until whites are set but yolks are still soft, spooning simmering water over yolks occasionally, about 3 minutes. Using slotted spoon, transfer poached eggs to bowl of cool water. Repeat with remaining 4 eggs. Reserve skillet with water. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 149°C. Place rimmed baking sheet in oven. Add enough oil to another large skillet to reach depth of 3/4 inch. Heat oil to 177°C. Fry tofu, 4 pieces at a time, until golden brown and crisp, 3 to 4 minutes per side. Transfer fried tofu to baking sheet in oven to keep warm.
Bring Lemongrass Broth to simmer in large pot. Add bok choy and shiitakes. Simmer until vegetables are tender, about 6 minutes. Add noodles; simmer 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.

Bring water in reserved skillet back to simmer and rewarm eggs in water 15 to 30 seconds. Transfer each egg to small bowl. Divide broth, noodles, and vegetables among 8 large bowls. Top each with 2 tofu pieces. Serve pickled radishes and eggs in small bowls alongside (eggs should be added to soup so yolks will enrich broth).
